'''Roqoo''' was a [[Star/Legends|star]] in the [[Hapes Consortium/Legends|Hapes Consortium]], which was orbited by [[Roqoo Depot]]. It was a [[Blue giant/Legends|Blue giant]] by the edge of the [[Transitory Mists]].<ref name="TCSWE">''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref> The solar wind interacted with the mists to form remarkable aurora.

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Tempest]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Inferno]]'' {{Mo}}

*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
